##  Workshop Schedule

Time (EDT) | Speaker | Title  
---|---|---  
08:30 - 08:40 |  Organizers  | Opening Remarks  
08:40 - 09:05 | Manxi Wu | Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning in Markov Potential Games and Beyond  
09:05 - 09:30 | Jana Tumova | Safety in HRI via Assume-guarantee Formal Synthesis  
09:30 - 09:55 | Abolfazl Hashemi | No-Regret Learning in Dynamic Stackelberg Games  
09:55 - 10:20 | Roberto Valenti | Mathematical Models for Cooperation and Safety in Multi-agent Transportation  
10:20 - 11:00 |  **Poster Session 1 and Coffee Break**  
11:00 - 12:00 |  **Contributed Session 1 (6 x 10min), Q &A after each talk**  
12:00 - 13:20 |  **Lunch Break**  
13:20 - 13:45 | Roya Firoozi | Interactive Autonomy in Complex Environments  
13:45 - 14:10 | Eric Mazumdar | Provably Convergent Independent Learning with Function Approximation in Competitive RL  
14:10 - 14:35 | Panagiotis Tsiotras | A Result on Zero-Sum Games Between Large-Population Teams  
14:35 - 15:00 | Peter Stone | DM2: Decentralized Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning via Distribution Matching  
15:00 - 15:25 | Gioele Zardini | Strategic Interactions across Scales: from Autonomy to Mobility Systems  
15:25 - 16:00 |  **Poster Session 2 and Coffee Break**  
16:00 - 17:10 |  **Contributed Session 2 (7 x 10min), Q &A after each talk**  
17:10 - 17:20 | Organizers | Closing Remarks
